description: Style Note Every woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with W's innovative styling. Wear this piece   with leggings and delicate sandals.  Product Details Blue printed kurta with square neck that is slightly curved at the centre, is sleeveless with cap sleeves, is elasticated and smocked on the shoulders and has a vented hem Material and Care 100% Cotton Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 5'8 and chest 32) is wearing a size WS
